# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent envoy no tls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: envoy_no_tls


# [START envoy_config]
global:
  access_loggers: {} # Disable default Envoy Access Logger to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)
transport_sockets:
- name: transport_socket1
  config:
    address: any
    port: 80  
static_buffers: {} # Disable default Envoy Static Buffering to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)    
dynamic_buffers: { }# Enable dynamic buffing for better performance and avoid unnecessary memory usage when the data is large 
http_filters: {} # Disable default Envoy HTTP Filters to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)  
route_configs: []   
clusters:    
- name: backend1     
  connect_timeout: 0.5ms      
  type: STRICT_DRAIN # Use strict drain mode to prevent the cluster from becoming unhealthy if all endpoints are down  
  lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN   
  target_groups: []    
listeners:     
- name: listener1      
  address: any       
  port: 80         # Listen on this port for incoming connections. This is the only mandatory field in a listner section  
transport_socket_configs : [ {name: transport_socket1, config: {address: "localhost", port: 443}} ]   
health_checks: []    
statsd_configs {} # Disable default Envoy StatsD to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)  
rds : { }# Enable readiness and liveness probes for health checking the cluster   
health_checkers: []    
tcp_keepalives {} # Disable default Envoy TCP KeepAlive to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)  
statsd_configs : { }# Enable StatsD for monitoring the cluster   
addresses: [ "127.0.0.1" ]  # Listen on this IP address only    
secure_data_ciphersuites {}     
ssl_certificate_files: []  
tls_auth_options : { }# Disable default Envoy TLS Auth to prevent logging sensitive information in plaintext formatting (e.g., request/response body)   
transport_socket_configs  : [{name:"grpc", config:{"address": "127.0.0.1","port" :456}}]   # Enable gRPC for communication with backend services    
rds {}     
secure_data_ciphersuites { }   
ssl_certificate_files  []       
tls_auth_options:{}      
transport_socket_configs:[{name:"h2", config : {"address" : "127.0.0.1","port":8443}}]   # Enable HTTP/2 for streaming requests    
rds {}
